title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH-CENTER - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS HIGH SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH-CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include: immunizations; routine and sports physical exams; treatment of illness and injury; dental; vision and blood pressure screenings; routine lab tests; mental health services; age-appropriate reproductive health; prescription medication maintenance; and health, fitness, nutritional education and promotion. 14486 SE 122nd Avenue Clackamas, OR 97015 Eligibility: Varies, call for information. Some SBHC are for students and staff only, others are for all children 0-19 in the school district, and others are open to the general public. Hours: Vary by site (503) 353-5890 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 353-5890 Main phone Main phone (503) 353-5890 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to schedule appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Clackamas County Services: Childhood Immunization Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLACKAMAS HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
